title: buxus cochinchinensis var. holttumiana
intro: Buxus cochinchinensis var. holttumiana, also known as Holttum's boxwood or Thai boxwood, is a variety of the Buxus cochinchinensis plant, a species of evergreen shrub native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects. Holttum's boxwood is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in traditional medicine formulas to treat a range of ailments.
